name: Suspicious LoadAssembly PowerShell Diagnostic Script Execution
description: Detects the execution of commands using the `CL_LoadAssembly.ps1` PowerShell diagnostic script, potentially to bypass AppLocker. This script can load .NET assemblies, and attackers may exploit this to evade security restrictions. This activity is highly suspicious.

parameters.name: timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: The Windows Security Event ID for Process Creation (4688).

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process that was executed, which should be 'powershell.exe'.

parameters.name: process_path
parameters.description: The full path to the powershell.exe executable.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line used to execute PowerShell, including 'CL_LoadAssembly.ps1' and 'LoadAssemblyFromPath'.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which PowerShell was executed.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
